title: Flatiron Health - Oncology EHR and Data Platform
problem: Oncology practices struggle with fragmented data, complex treatment protocols, and lack of real-world evidence for cancer care optimization.
solution: Cloud-based oncology EHR and data platform that standardizes cancer data, enables clinical decision support, and powers real-world evidence research.
technology: Cloud EHR, data analytics, machine learning, NLP for structured data extraction from unstructured clinical notes
target_customer: Community oncology practices, health systems, life sciences companies
ai_type: NLP, ML for clinical decision support
varden_fit: HIGH - Oncology data infrastructure and practice management align strongly with Varden's platform approach. Could serve as model for specialty care coordination.
notes: Category-defining company in oncology data. Created the standard for structured oncology data collection.
